Today is '''{{#time: l |now + {{#expr:3600*{{Rashid Location/DST}}}} seconds - 10 hours }}''' so you will find Rashid in '''{{#switch:{{#time: l |now + {{#expr:3600*{{Rashid Location/DST}}}} seconds - 10 hours }}|Monday=Svargrond|Tuesday=Liberty Bay|Wednesday=Port Hope|Thursday=Ankrahmun|Friday=Darashia|Saturday=Edron|Sunday=Carlin}}'''. (If it is not {{#time: l |now + {{#expr:3600*{{Rashid Location/DST}}}} seconds - 10 hours }} in Tibia, [{{FULLURL:Rashid|action=purge}} purge the cache].) | city = Svargrond | geolabel = Svargrond | posx = 125.210 | posy = 121.182 | posz = 7 | city2 = Liberty Bay | geolabel2 = Liberty Bay | posx2 = 126.47 | posy2 = 128.67 | posz2 = 7 | city3 = Port Hope | geolabel3 = Port Hope | posx3 = 127.65 | posy3 = 127.241 | posz3 = 7 | city4 = Ankrahmun | geolabel4 = Ankrahmun | posx4 = 129.45 | posy4 = 128.118 | posz4 = 6 | city5 = Darashia | geolabel5 = Darashia | posx5 = 129.214 | posy5 = 126.227 | posz5 = 7 | city6 = Edron | geolabel6 = Edron | posx6 = 129.150 | posy6 = 124.57 | posz6 = 6 | city7 = Carlin | geolabel7 = Carlin | posx7 = 126.71 | posy7 = 124.39 | posz7 = 6 | gender = Male | race = Human | buysell = yes | sounds = {{Sound List|}} | implemented = 8.10 | notes = [[File:Rashid_Big.png|thumb|right|300px]] You need to win his trust before selling any items to him. He travels to a different city everyday.

This [[NPC]] changes his location everyday.
On '''Mondays''' you can find him in [[Svargrond]], in [[Dankwart]]'s tavern, south of the temple.
On '''Tuesdays''' you can find him in [[Liberty Bay]], in [[Lyonel]]'s tavern, west of the depot.
On '''Wednesdays''' you can find him in [[Port Hope]], in [[Clyde]]'s tavern, west of the depot.
On '''Thursdays''' you can find him in [[Ankrahmun]], in [[Arito]]'s tavern, above the post office.
On '''Fridays''' you can find him in [[Darashia]], in [[Miraia]]'s tavern, south of the guildhalls.
On '''Saturdays''' you can find him in [[Edron]], in [[Mirabell]]'s tavern, above the depot.
On '''Sundays''' you can find him in [[Carlin]] depot, one floor above. To be able to trade with him, you must complete [[The Traveling Trader Quest]].

}}
